_patch_meta.description: Verse context classification — batch VCB-006, 135 terms, 2444 verses. Correction to V1: H7451A (mti_id=235) group 235-001 restored. V1 incorrectly dissolved group 235-001 (bad news/evil report as inner fear/grief/sadness) because the observations file contained a duplicate 235-001 code from a mid-stream revision during the classification session. The patch builder dissolved both blocks when D-010 was issued, incorrectly setting aside 5 verses: Neh 2:2, Neh 2:1, Gen 40:7, Exo 33:4, Psa 112:7. V2 restores the correct three-group structure for H7451A: 235-001 (bad news/fear), 235-002 (harmful spirit), 235-003 (evil as suffering). All other terms unchanged from V1. Root cause documented in instruction update WA-VerseContext-Instruction-v2.1-20260401.md.
